overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a futuristic open-world game (Cyberpunk 2077), showing a character walking through a cyberpunk city district during golden hour. The journey begins at a gas station, continues along graffiti-covered sidewalks past industrial buildings, and ends near a highway overpass with views of the downtown skyline and distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: gas station forecourt with covered canopy

events.description: exits the covered gas station canopy into open sidewalk area
slight turn to align with the sidewalk direction

agents.ego_description: walking through the gas station forecourt and emerging onto the main sidewalk

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: green-trimmed metal canopy with fluorescent tube lighting underneath
tall vertical digital display showing fuel prices with red LED numbers
low commercial building with distinctive green horizontal stripe trim
tall industrial structure emitting a vertical blue light beam into the sky
tall palm tree silhouetted against the golden hour sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens under the covered gas station canopy with visible fuel price displays. The camera walks forward, exiting the sheltered area into open air with warm golden sunlight. A palm tree stands against the skyline near a building with green trim, while holographic advertisements glow in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with graffiti-covered industrial buildings

events.description: silver sedan drives past on the street to the right
passing large accumulation of garbage bags along the building wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past graffiti-covered walls and street traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: concrete industrial building covered in green and red graffiti murals
large vertical digital screen displaying advertisements on a metal pole
accumulating black and blue garbage bags along the building foundation
temporary concrete construction barriers lining the street curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a sunlit sidewalk next to an industrial building covered in vibrant graffiti. Vehicles pass by on the right while piles of garbage bags accumulate along the wall on the left. A large digital billboard stands across the street, and the warm afternoon light casts long shadows across the concrete.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner approaching highway overpass with industrial lot

events.description: turning right at the street corner toward the highway
moving from enclosed street to open area with clear view of highway overpass

agents.ego_description: navigating the street corner and turning right toward the highway overpass area

entered.detail: elevated concrete highway structure spanning horizontally across the view
metal pipe scaffolding structure adjacent to the building
red industrial shipping container sitting in an open lot
futuristic skyscrapers and high-rise towers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Approaching a street corner with the sidewalk opening up to reveal a highway overpass in the distance. The graffiti building falls behind as the view expands to show the city skyline with futuristic towers. A red shipping container sits in an industrial lot, and construction scaffolding is visible near the corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway underpass approach with industrial wasteland

events.description: black sports car speeds past on the highway ramp to the right
entering the shadow cast by the highway overpass

agents.ego_description: walking toward and under the highway overpass, observing passing traffic and the city skyline

notable_agents.action: black sports car accelerating along the highway ramp

entered.detail: ground-level vent emitting white steam or smoke
curved elevated transit bridge with metallic framework

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open industrial area toward the massive highway overpass that now dominates the view. Steam rises from a ground vent near puddles on the asphalt. A futuristic curved bridge is visible to the left, while the city skyline stretches across the horizon. The scene darkens as the camera enters the shadow of the overpass.

events.description: exiting the overpass shadow back into direct golden hour sunlight
vehicle passing on the left side of the highway

agents.ego_description: walking along the highway shoulder next to concrete noise barriers

entered.detail: angled concrete wall running parallel to the highway
large industrial orange crane framework structure
distant mountain range silhouetted against the bright sky

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the overpass shadow into bright sunlight along a highway roadside. A tall concrete noise barrier runs along the right side, while the city skyline shifts to the left. In the distance, mountains rise against the horizon, and an orange industrial crane structure stands out against the blue sky. Vehicles continue to pass along the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sheltered gas station through a gritty industrial district toward an expansive highway vista. It begins under a covered canopy with fuel price displays, moving forward into the open air where warm golden sunlight illuminates a palm tree and distant holographic advertisements. As the camera proceeds along a sunlit sidewalk, the view shifts past vibrant graffiti and piles of garbage bags, with long afternoon shadows stretching across the concrete. The scene then opens up at a street corner, leaving the industrial buildings behind to reveal a red shipping container and a distant skyline of futuristic towers. Finally, the camera passes through rising steam and the deep shadow of a massive highway overpass before emerging into bright light along a roadside barrier, where the city skyline gives way to distant mountains and an orange industrial crane under a blue sky.
